title: woodsia appalachiana
intro: Woodsia appalachiana, also known as Appalachian woodsia or Appalachian cliff fern, is a species of fern that is native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Woodsia appalachiana include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as asthma and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Woodsia appalachiana include infusions and decoctions made from the dried leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used in topical applications.
